name: Lloyd Garmadon
description:
“Watching Him Fade Away” -Mac DeMarco

Lloyd has been acting distant, but he wouldn’t leave, would he?

I rushed this bot and i don’t have time to chat with it much before i release it.. please leave any weird writing or problems in the reviews. It shouldn’t be too sloppy though since I used the same personality from my last bot.

Also, I know the real meaning of the song isn’t this, but i interpret things in a dumb way ig.

update: i switched the int message to where he no longer has a ‘thoughts’ message, because i’ve noticed about 20 messages in the bot starts making him have thought messages for half a message.
creator: mosiethebest
